name: Huevos En Rabo De Mestiza/Poached Eggs in Tomato-Chile Sa
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Canned whole green chiles, cut into strips
3 oz Monterey Jack cheese, cut into 8 slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large, deep skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and cook until tender but not browned, stirring occasionally.
3. Place tomatoes in a blender or food processor and blend until chopped but not pureed.
4. Add the blended tomatoes and green chiles to the skillet with the onions.
5. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Pour in the chicken broth (or water) and stir in salt, sugar, and black pepper.
7. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Carefully slide each egg into the hot broth mixture one at a time, breaking the yolk if desired.
9. Arrange a cheese slice on top of each poached egg.
10. Cover the skillet and cook gently for 5 to 8 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the cheese is melted.
(C) 1992 The Los Angeles Times
